params.agentSignature: EIP-712 signature from the agent token owner
params.expiration: Unix timestamp for link expiry (0 = permanent)
params.humanSignature: EIP-712 signature from the Ethos profile wallet

eip712Domain().details: returns the fields and values that describe the domain separator used by this contract for EIP-712 signature.

createVerifiedLink(address,uint256,uint2.notice: Create a link between an agent and a human profile.

revokeLink(uint256).notice: Revoke an active link. Can be called by the human or agent wallet.

totalLinks().notice: Total number of links ever created.

upgradeLink(uint256,bytes,uint256).notice: Add the missing signature to upgrade a Level 1/2 link to Level 3.
